title: USDA releases Local Food Marketing Practices Data
summary: Over 147,000 U.S. farms produced and sold food locally through direct marketing practices, resulting in $9.0 billion in revenue in 2020, according to the Local Food Marketing Practices data released today by USDA’s National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS). title: Tales from Nature’s Highways
summary: This book by Frederick James Currier is an Alaskan adventure memoir of his time in the north from the late 1800s and early 1900s. The post Tales from Nature’s Highways appeared first on Alaska Magazine .
